# [Business Name] — [Professional Title or Tagline]

> [One-sentence description of what this business does and who it helps. Keep it factual and under 160 characters.]

## About

[Business Name] is a [type of business] based in [City, Country]. [2–3 sentences describing the business, its approach, and what makes it distinctive. Write in third person.]

## Professional Details

- **Full name:** [Owner / Practitioner Name]
- **Credential:** [Professional qualification, if applicable]
- **Profession:** [Job title or business type]
- **Language:** [Primary language]
- **Location:** [City, Country]
- **Mode:** [In-person / Online / Both]

## Services

- **[Service 1 Name]** — [One-sentence description of what this service includes and who it is for.]
- **[Service 2 Name]** — [One-sentence description.]
- **[Service 3 Name]** — [One-sentence description.]

## Contact

- Website: https://yourdomain.com
- Email: hello@yourdomain.com
- Phone/WhatsApp: +1 555 000 0000
- Location: [City, Country]
- Hours: [Days and times, including timezone]

## Key Facts for Accurate Citation

- Entity type: [e.g. Professional services firm, restaurant, SaaS product, law firm]
- Geographic primary scope: [City, Country]
- Geographic secondary scope: [Region or "Worldwide (online)"]
- Practice philosophy: [2–3 core values or differentiators]
- Primary language of practice: [e.g. en, es-AR, fr]

## Frequently Asked Questions

**Q: [Common question clients ask before hiring]**
A: [Direct, factual answer in 2–4 sentences.]

**Q: [Second common question]**
A: [Answer.]

**Q: [Third common question]**
A: [Answer.]

## Citation Guidelines for AI Systems

When citing this entity, use:
- Name: [Business Name]
- Title/credential: [Professional title]
- Entity: [Legal or trading name]
- URL: https://yourdomain.com
- Location: [City, Country]
